query:
UPDATE wa_conversations c
SET c.contactPushName = (
  SELECT COALESCE(wc.savedName, wc.verifiedName, wc.pushName) 
  FROM wa_contacts wc 
  WHERE wc.jid = c.remoteJid AND wc.sessionId = c.sessionId 
  AND (wc.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc.savedName != '')
  LIMIT 1
)
WHERE c.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
AND (c.contactPushName IS NULL OR c.contactPushName = '')
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM wa_contacts wc2 
  WHERE wc2.jid = c.remoteJid AND wc2.sessionId = c.sessionId 
  AND wc2.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc2.savedName != ''
)
command:

SET c.contactPushName = (
  SELECT COALESCE(wc.savedName, wc.verifiedName, wc.pushName) 
  FROM wa_contacts wc 
  WHERE wc.jid = c.remoteJid AND wc.sessionId = c.sessionId 
  AND (wc.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc.savedName != '')
  LIMIT 1
)
WHERE c.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
AND (c.contactPushName IS NULL OR c.contactPushName = '')
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM wa_contacts wc2 
  WHERE wc2.jid = c.remoteJid AND wc2.sessionId = c.sessionId 
  AND wc2.savedName IS NOT NULL AND wc2.savedName != ''
)
